titleStmt.title: SII 38.479: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 479. (A.R. No. 479 of 1912.) TIRUTTUṞAIPPŪṆḌI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the west wall, maṇḍapa infront of the central shrine, Marundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Rājarāja III Year 19: Paṅguni = 1235 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of 3 mā and 3 kāṇi of land as tirunāmattukkāṇi by Kiḻavaṉ Nāyagadēvaṉ Periyanāthadēvaṉ of Kuṉṟalūr in Iḍaiyar-nāḍu (a subdivision of) Rājēndrachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu to the god Tiruttuṟai-nāyaṉār. It is stated that the donor bought this land, called puṅgaṉ-śey, situated at Āriyanāṟṟūr, from a person, Divākarappallavaraiyan and enjoyed it as his kāṇi. The yield of the gifted land after remitting the tax was to be given for the anointment of the god.
The donor and Amarapriyaṅkaraṉ, the accountant of the village Kuṉṟalūr, the son of Tiḻailūr-uḍaiyāṉ, figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī �Read rājarāja
jaRead rājarājatevarkku yāṇṭu pattoṉpatāvatu paṉṉāṉiRead paṅkuṉimāta
ṉpatāvatu paṉṉāṉiRead paṅkuṉimāta
ttu Oru nāḷ �Read rājarācentiraco
ḻavaḷanāṭṭu Iṭaiyaḷanāṭṭu
kuṉṟaṉalūrkiḻavaṉ nāyakatevaṉ
periyanātatevaṉṉeṉ Uṭaiyā
r tiruttuṟaināyaṉārkku tirunāmat
tukkāṇiyāka nāṉ nirvāttu
kuṭutta nilamāvatu puṟaṅkarampai
nāṭṭu Āriyaṉāṟṟūril kuṉṟalūr kiḻa
vaṉ nāyaka teva ti
vākarappallavaraiyaṉ ṉilam
Aṉṉiyanāmattu vilaiko
ṇṭu Eṉ kāṇiyāy Aṉupavit
tu varukiṟa puṅkaṉcey potta
kappaṭi � c ciṉṉamum Etirā
māṇṭu mutal tirunāmattukkāṇi
yāka kaiykkoṇṭu Aṉupa
vittu kaṭamai Iṟuttu Iṟai
mikuti tirumeṟppūccukku Uṭalāka
kuṭuttamaikku Inta potta
kappaṭi nilamuṉṟu mā mukkāṇic
ciṉṉamum tirunāmattukāṇiyā
ka kuṭuttamaikku Ivai kuṉṟalū
r kiḻavaṉ nāyakatevaṉ periya nā
ya(ṉ)ṉeḻuttu Ivai kuṉṟalūr ka
ṇakku tiḻailūruṭaiyāṉ makaṉ
Amarapuyaṅkaraṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.479 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
